alkylation reagent: incubated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min to alkylate cysteine residues
alkylation concentration: incubated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min to alkylate cysteine residues
cleavage agent: gel pieces were digested in 30 μl of 25 mM triethylammonium bicarbonate containing 5 μg ml−1 of trypsin
instrument: data from the QTrap analysis showed that Ser343 was phosphorylated
labeling: the resulting peptides were analyzed by liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS-MS).
